description: Inter-session/inter-agent/inter-project messaging plugin for Agent Zero. All 8 phases complete. Phase 1: mailbox core. Phase 2: live delivery. Phase 4: agent-to-agent comms (forward, broadcast, cross-project permissions, auto-inbox extension). Phase 5: configuration & security. Phase 6: integration testing (13 tests). Phase 7-8: Telegram UX polish (conductor routing prompt, updated messenger prompt with all 7 actions, plugin.yaml Telegram-ready, comprehensive README, USAGE_EXAMPLES (6 scenarios), GOTCHAS (8 gotchas)). Plugin review self-check: 2 WARN (config.html inline toasts pre-existing, LICENSE absent). Git commit f0fc081.
gaps_known: session_manager.py imports agent/AgentContext which won't exist in test — must mock via sys.modules or patch.dict before importing MessengerTool
_check marks messages as read — tests needing message_id for _forward must read inbox with mark_read=False first
_check_cross_project_permission checks from_project against allowed list, not to_project — test accordingly
notes: Phase 1: send/check/reply, JSONL mailbox, 5 tests. Phase 2: SessionRegistry, MessageBus, list_sessions, 7 tests. Phase 4: forward, broadcast, cross-project permissions, auto-inbox extension, 8 tests. Phase 5: config resolution, permission integration, 6 tests. Phase 6: 13 tests — switch_session, timeout, multi-step, forward annotation, cross-project blocking, broadcast, auto-inbox, parallel sessions, routing state persistence, edge cases. Phase 7-8: Documentation & polish — messenger prompt updated (7/7 actions), conductor routing prompt (8 natural language commands), plugin.yaml description, dual READMEs, USAGE_EXAMPLES (6 scenarios), GOTCHAS (8 gotchas). Plugin review self-check: 2 WARNs (config.html inline toasts pre-existing, LICENSE absent for Plugin Index). All tests pass. Git commit f0fc081. PROJECT COMPLETE.
